series_metadata.series_description: BCI & FBI background check results received per application requirements.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Background check results are noted as having been received/reviewed via a checkmark in the application file. Retain FBI & BCI results for 1 year from receipt, then destroy, unless the results require referral to enforcement in which case, the results are retained according to enforcement file retention schedules. ; Electronic: Background check results are noted as having been received/reviewed via a checkmark in the application file. Retain FBI & BCI results for 1 year from receipt, then destroy, unless the results require referral to enforcement in which case, the results are retained according to enforcement file retention schedules., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
